texto: But just being whatever it is that I am . . . I don’t think that makes me a monster. Believe me, I know. ere are plenty of real monsters walking around out there in the world. ey look respectable, but can’t hide who they are from me. Real monsters hurt people for pleasure, or for no reason at all—they’re just not as well armed as I am.
explicacao: Citação de Michael Selden sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “But just being whatever it is that I am . . . I don’t think that makes me a monster. Believe me, …” articula reflexao, dystopian, scifi em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como scifi e young-adult.
